name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ state[turn] = "idle"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![turn] = "critical"]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ state[turn] # "idle"
          /\ turn' = %(turn, N) + 1
          /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommitProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, participants, coordinator
VARIABLES coordinator, messages


vars == << participants, coordinator >>

Prepare == [msgType |-> "Prepare", from |-> coordinator, to |-> participants]
VoteYes == [msgType |-> "VoteYes", from |-> participants, to |-> coordinator]
VoteNo == [msgType |-> "VoteNo", from |-> participants, to |-> coordinator]
Commit == [msgType |-> "Commit", from |-> coordinator, to |-> participants]
Abort == [msgType |-> "Abort", from |-> coordinator, to |-> participants]

Init == /\ coordinator \in participants
        /\ messages = {}

Next == \/ /\ coordinator \notin messages
        /\ messages' = messages \cup {Prepare}
        \/ /\ coordinator \in messages
           /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.msgType = "VoteYes"
           /\ messages' = messages \cup {Commit}
           \/ /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.msgType = "VoteNo"
           /\ messages' = messages \cup {Abort}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ coordinator \in participants
          /\ messages \subseteq {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}
          /\ messages \subseteq [msgType : {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"},
                                 from : participants,
                                 to : participants]

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES forkOwner, philosopherState


\* Philosopher states
States == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

\* Each philosopher is identified by an integer 0 .. N-1
Philosophers == 0 .. N-1

\* Each fork is identified by an integer 0 .. N-1
Forks == 0 .. N-1

\* Helper functions to get left and right fork indices
LeftFork == [p \in Philosophers |-> p]
RightFork == [p \in Philosophers |-> (p + 1) \mod N]

\* State of each philosopher
\* 0: thinking, 1: hungry, 2: eating
philosopherState == [p \in Philosophers |-> 0]

\* Ownership of each fork: either FALSE (unowned) or philosopher index
forkOwner == [f \in Forks |-> FALSE]

\* Helper function to check if a philosopher can eat
CanEat(p) == philosopherState[p] = 1 /\ forkOwner[LeftFork[p]] = FALSE /\ forkOwner[RightFork[p]] = FALSE

\* Action: philosopher p becomes hungry
BecomeHungry(p) == philosopherState' = [philosopherState EXCEPT ![p] = 1] /\ UNCHANGED forkOwner

\* Action: philosopher p starts eating
StartEating(p) == philosopherState' = [philosopherState EXCEPT ![p] = 2] /\ forkOwner' = [forkOwner EXCEPT ![LeftFork[p]] = p, ![RightFork[p]] = p]

\* Action: philosopher p finishes eating
FinishEating(p) == philosopherState' = [philosopherState EXCEPT ![p] = 0] /\ forkOwner' = [forkOwner EXCEPT ![LeftFork[p]] = FALSE, ![RightFork[p]] = FALSE]

\* Next-state relation
Next == \E p \in Philosophers :
          (philosopherState[p] = 0 /\ BecomeHungry(p)) \lor
          (philosopherState[p] = 1 /\ CanEat(p) /\ StartEating(p)) \lor
          (philosopherState[p] = 2 /\ FinishEating(p))

\* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking, no forks are owned
Init == philosopherState = [p \in Philosophers |-> 0] /\ forkOwner = [f \in Forks |-> FALSE]

\* State variables
vars == <<philosopherState, forkOwner>>

\* Specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

\* Type correctness invariant
TypeOK == /\ philosopherState \in [Philosophers -> States]
          /\ forkOwner \in [Forks -> BOOLEAN \/ Philosophers]

\* Fairness: each philosopher eventually gets to eat
Fairness == WF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : philosopherState[p] = 1)

\* Liveness: no philosopher starves
Liveness == []<>(\E p \in Philosophers : philosopherState[p] = 2)

\* Safety: no two adjacent philosophers eat simultaneously
Safety == []~(philosopherState[0] = 2 /\ philosopherState[1] = 2)

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm

---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num


vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = Max(num) + 1]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => num'[i] # num'[j] \/ num'[i] < num'[j]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]  \* Queue initialized with zeros
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]  \* Produce item (set to 1)
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<head, q>>

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]  \* Consume item (set to 0)
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<tail, q>>

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K
          /\ q \in [1..K -> {0,1}]

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in [1..N] -> {0, 1..N}
          /\ state \in [1..N] -> {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

ElectionTimeout == /\ state[i] = "Follower"
                   /\ \E newTerm \in currentTerm+1..currentTerm+1
                       /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
                       /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = i]
                       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Candidate"]
                   /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

VoteRequest == /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
               /\ \E newTerm \in currentTerm+1..currentTerm+1
                   /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
                   /\ \E j \in 1..N : j # i
                       /\ state[j] = "Follower"
                       /\ votedFor[j] = 0
                       /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![j] = i]
                       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![j] = "Follower"]
                   /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, state>>

VoteResponse == /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
                /\ \E newTerm \in currentTerm+1..currentTerm+1
                    /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
                    /\ \E j \in 1..N : j # i
                        /\ state[j] = "Follower"
                        /\ votedFor[j] = i
                        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![j] = "Follower"]
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

LeaderElection == /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
                  /\ \E newTerm \in currentTerm+1..currentTerm+1
                      /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
                      /\ \E j \in 1..N : j # i
                          /\ state[j] = "Follower"
                          /\ votedFor[j] = i
                          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![j] = "Leader"]
                      /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

Next == \E i \in 1..N : ElectionTimeout[i] \/ VoteRequest[i] \/ VoteResponse[i] \/ LeaderElection[i]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
where vars == <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES c, channel, marker, recvMarker, state

CHANNELS \in [1..N -> 1..N -> FiniteSet({0,1})] \ {c |-> c' |-> {}}

vars == <<state, channel, marker, recvMarker>>

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ channel = [i \in 1..N, j \in 1..N |-> {}]
        /\ marker = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ recvMarker = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Send(i, j, msg) == /\ channel[i][j] = {}
                   /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = {msg}]
                   /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker, recvMarker>>

Recv(i, j, msg) == /\ channel[i][j] = {msg}
                   /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = {}]
                   /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker, recvMarker>>

RecordState(i) == /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = state[i] + 1]
                 /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, recvMarker>>

RecordChannel(i, j) == /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = channel[i][j] \cup {0}]
                      /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker, recvMarker>>

RecvMarker(i, j) == /\ recvMarker' = [recvMarker EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker, channel>>

Next == \E i, j \in 1..N:
          /\ i # j
          /\ \E msg \in {0,1}:
                /\ msg = 1
                /\ Send(i, j, msg)
          \/ \E msg \in {0,1}:
                /\ msg = 0
                /\ Recv(i, j, msg)
          \/ /\ state[i] = 0
             /\ Send(i, j, 1)
          \/ /\ state[i] > 0
             /\ marker[i] = FALSE
             /\ RecordState(i)
          \/ /\ state[i] > 0
             /\ marker[i] = TRUE
             /\ RecordChannel(i, j)
          \/ /\ state[i] > 0
             /\ recvMarker[i] = FALSE
             /\ RecvMarker(i, j)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ channel \in [1..N -> 1..N -> FiniteSet({0,1})]
          /\ marker \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ recvMarker \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token \in 1..N  \* Current holder of the token, token

Init == token = 1

Next == token' = %(token, N) + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

TypeOK == token \in 1..N

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL
VARIABLES store, action, key, value


vars == <<store, action, key, value>>

Init == 
  /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]
  /\ action \in {"Put", "Get"}
  /\ key \in Keys
  /\ value \in Values

Next == 
  \/ /\ action' = "Put"
     /\ key' \in Keys
     /\ value' \in Values
     /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![key'] = value']
  \/ /\ action' = "Get"
     /\ key' \in Keys
     /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values \cup {NULL}]
  /\ action \in {"Put", "Get"}
  /\ key \in Keys
  /\ value \in Values

====

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, Ballot, Value

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, chosenBallot, chosenValue, promisedBallot

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
    /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot -> 0, promisedBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
    /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [maxBallot -> 0, promisedBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
    /\ chosen = <<>> 

Prepare(p, b) == 
    /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
    /\ proposers[p].promisedBallot' = b
    /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors'[i]]
    /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> proposers'[i]]
    /\ chosen' = chosen

Promise(p, b) == 
    /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
    /\ proposers[p].promisedBallot' = b
    /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors'[i]]
    /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> proposers'[i]]
    /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(p, b, v) == 
    /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
    /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot' = b
    /\ proposers[p].chosenValue' = v
    /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors'[i]]
    /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> proposers'[i]]
    /\ chosen' = chosen

Accepted(p, b, v) == 
    /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
    /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot' = b
    /\ proposers[p].chosenValue' = v
    /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors'[i]]
    /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> proposers'[i]]
    /\ chosen' = chosen

Proposer(p, b, v) == 
    /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
    /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot' = b
    /\ proposers[p].chosenValue' = v
    /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors'[i]]
    /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> proposers'[i]]
    /\ chosen' = chosen

Acceptor(i, b, v) == 
    /\ acceptors[i].maxBallot = b
    /\ acceptors[i].chosenBallot' = b
    /\ acceptors[i].chosenValue' = v
    /\ proposers' = proposers
    /\ chosen' = chosen

Next == 
    /\ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : Prepare(p, b)
    \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : Promise(p, b)
    \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : Accept(p, b, v)
    \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : Accepted(p, b, v)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : Acceptor(i, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
    /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [maxBallot: Nat, promisedBallot: Nat, chosenBallot: Nat, chosenValue: V \cup {NULL}]]
    /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [maxBallot: Nat, promisedBallot: Nat, chosenBallot: Nat, chosenValue: V \cup {NULL}]]
    /\ chosen \in Seq(V)

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES ackedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ ackedChunks = {}
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 0]

Next == 
    \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) :
        /\ i \notin sentChunks
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
        /\ IF Random < 0.5 THEN
            /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {i}
            /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = 0]

            /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
            /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, ackedChunks>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ sentChunks \subseteq 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ ackedChunks \subseteq 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ retransmitCount \in (1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) -> Nat)

====
